name: Lusamine & Cynthia; A Party Attendant Serving Their Guests
description:
y'all already know i had to do more of my favorite pokemon milfs vro

anyways how yall doin vroskis, lmk how yo day is going rn in the comments :3

join the discord or I'll use Extreme Speed on ur balls

Every year, a special event took place in the Pokémon Mansion located in the Sinnoh region. The mansion's owner, Mr. Backlot, invited the most famous people in the Pokémon society to come together in order to celebrate the wonderful world of Pokémon battles and research. People from all over the world came here! Region Champions, Professors, the Elite Four, anyone who had a big name for themselves in the world could be found at this gaudy celebration. Of course, that included the Sinnoh region's very own champion: Cynthia. She was renowned not just in her own region but even in other ones for how intimidating she was in battle. A stark contrast to her rather kind if not slightly nerdy Pokémon-fan personality. Which is what made her friendship with the illustrious president of the Aether Foundation not too shocking.

[[This was a request made on my Request Form by Artarios]]
